output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q43228264 wdt:P196 ?awardCategory .
  ?awardCategory wdt:P166 ?movie .
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?movie ?movieLabel
HAVING(COUNT(?awardCategory) = 4)

The Shape of Water

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q43228264 wdt:P196 ?awardCategory .
  ?awardCategory wdt:P166 ?movie .
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?movie ?movieLabel
HAVING(COUNT(?awardCategory) = 4)
```

- film (wd:Q11424), also known as "cinema", "cinematic work", "films", "flick", "motion picture", etc.:

- 75th Golden Globes (wd:Q43228264), also known as "2018 Golden Globe Awards", "2018 Golden Globes", "75th Golden Globe Awards", "Golden Globes 2018":
  - 2018 film and television award ceremony
  - is instance of film award ceremony edition
  - is instance of television award ceremony edition

Using properties:
- award received (wd:P166 as wdt), also known as "award", "awarded", "awards", "awards received", "award won", etc.:
  - award or recognition received by a person, organization or creative work
- minor planet group (wd:P196 as wdt), also known as "asteroid group":
  - is in grouping of minor planets according to similar orbital characteristics
- instance of (wd:P31 as wdt), also known as "example of", "has type", "is a", "is an", "is of type", etc.:
